seo.title: Make an Appointment | Plan Your Recovery
seo.description: Schedule an appointment with Plan Your Recovery for counseling, psychiatry, or buprenorphine treatment. Contact us by phone or email.

hero.headline: Make an Appointment
hero.intro: Getting started begins with a conversation. Reach out directly to any of our clinicians, or contact us at the numbers below and we'll connect you with the right person.

contacts.label: Buprenorphine / OUD Treatment
contacts.note: New patients for buprenorphine are typically seen within 1–3 days. Call the psychiatry line to schedule.

directNote: You can also reach out directly to any clinician on our team page — many list personal phone numbers and emails.

steps.title: A brief phone call
steps.body: We'll take a few minutes to understand your situation and make sure we're a good fit before scheduling a full appointment.

steps.title: An initial assessment
steps.body: Your first appointment is typically 60 minutes. We'll ask about your history, current challenges, and what you're hoping to change.

steps.title: A collaborative plan
steps.body: Together we'll identify next steps — therapy, medication, or both — tailored to your goals, not a one-size-fits-all program.
